allow: Bash(git commit -m "feat\(spec\): add package.json and tsconfig for npm publishing")
Bash(git commit -m "chore: rename npm org from @openflashcard to @open-flashcard")
Bash(git commit -m "feat\(validator\): scaffold @open-flashcard/validator package with Zod schemas")
Bash(git commit -m "chore: add ESLint and Prettier config")
Bash(git commit -m "refactor\(validator\): check schemas against spec types via satisfies z.ZodType<T>")
